type.description: master keys have no linked supplier; supplier keys link to exactly one supplier

supplier_name.description: Supplier display name (denormalized for fast lookup)

supplier_id.description: Reference to Supplier record (optional for master keys)

vertical.description: Optional vertical code this key is used for

key.description: Full key value — only present at creation; should be hashed in production

key_prefix.description: First 16 chars of key, shown in UI

allowed_ips.description: JSON array of allowed IP addresses, optional

expose_revenue.description: When true, supplier responses may include revenue
